metadata.title: YAPU Solutions — Digital Tools for Microfinance
metadata.description: We help microfinance institutions assess climate risks, measure impact, and make better lending decisions.

home.heroSubtitle: We build digital tools that help microfinance institutions assess risks, measure impact, and make better lending decisions — so they can focus on the people who need it most.
home.solutionsSubtitle: Three integrated modules that cover the full lending cycle — from field data collection to investor reporting.
home.partnersClients: And trusted by microfinance institutions across Latin America and West Africa
home.howSubtitle: From integration to insight in three steps.
home.aboutSubtitle: 11 people, two offices, one mission. YAPU derives from Yapuchiri — traditional leader farmers in the Bolivian Andes who collect, create, and share knowledge.
home.contactTitle: Ready to modernize your microfinance operations?
home.contactSubtitle: Let’s talk about how YAPU can help your institution make smarter, greener lending decisions.

footer.copyright: YAPU Solutions GmbH. All rights reserved.
